name: recoil_app_mission_fmv_state_destructor
description: RecoilApp_MissionFmvState::Destructor cleans the embedded mission FMV script and restores the base state vtable.
known_limits: VC6 12.00.8168 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 57 unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 62 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The strict blocker is destructor/EH cleanup and zFMV_Script::Cleanup call shape; zFMV_Script::Cleanup itself is functional-equivalent accepted but not Binary-safe.
The native smoke allocates the embedded mission FMV path, calls the destructor, checks path cleanup plus base vtable restoration, and exercises the scalar deleting destructor.
